nativePolicy: Roving focus supports Home, End, orientation arrows, RTL spatial arrows, wrapping, and disabled skipping.
Arrow movement never changes selection; native activation does.
Single selection cannot become empty unless allowEmpty is explicit.

compositionPolicy.familySignature: Each pressed action carries the shared Green state rail, Ink structure, and Violet focus seam.
compositionPolicy.enhancement: renderSelectionSummary adds a live summary rail for single or multiple selection; omitting it removes the rail and live region.
